gt_sql: SELECT t2.buildUpPlaySpeedClass FROM Team AS t1 INNER JOIN Team_Attributes AS t2 ON t1.team_api_id = t2.team_api_id WHERE t1.team_long_name = 'Willem II' AND SUBSTR(t2.`date`, 1, 10) = '2011-02-22'
pred_sql:
SELECT ta.buildUpPlaySpeedClass
FROM Team t
JOIN Team_Attributes ta ON t.team_api_id = ta.team_api_id
WHERE t.team_long_name = 'Willem II'
AND ta.date = '2011-02-22 00:00:00'
question: What was the build up play speed class for "Willem II" on 2011/2/22?
